title: stelis dimidia
intro: Stelis dimidia, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, Stelis dimidia has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Stelis dimidia is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
